reasoning: Chelsea has successfully qualified for the 2025-26 UEFA Champions League and will compete in the league phase. Recent sportsbook odds from late August 2025 have Chelsea listed as the 8th favorite at 12/1 to win the tournament, trailing teams like PSG, Liverpool, Real Madrid, Barcelona, Arsenal, Manchester City, and Bayern Munich. An odds ratio of 12/1 yields an implied probability of about 7.7%, and once the typical outright market overround (vig) is removed, the true probability lies closer to 6.5-7%. Though they won the summer 2025 Club World Cup, there are roughly seven stronger contenders in the Champions League, keeping their chances in the mid-single digits.
